languages.text: "Ваш интерес к моей династии неиссякаем, не так ли? Да будет вам известно, что мои планы гораздо более амбициозны. Вскоре фон Валанциус станет самой могущественной династией Вольных Торговцев. Но даже не рассчитывайте, что я поделюсь с вами деталями своего плана. Вы все узнаете сами".

traits.locale_text: "Ваш интерес к моей династии неиссякаем, не так ли? Да будет вам известно, что мои планы гораздо более амбициозны. Вскоре фон Валанциус станет самой могущественной династией Вольных Торговцев. Но даже не рассчитывайте, что я поделюсь с вами деталями своего плана. Вы все узнаете сами".

languages.text: "Your interest in my dynasty is endless, isn't it? You should know that my plans are far more ambitious. House von Valancius will soon be the most powerful Rogue Trader dynasty in the Expanse. But do not hold your breath for details of my plan. You will have to wait and see."
languages.original_text: "Ваш интерес к моей династии неиссякаем, не так ли? Да будет вам известно, что мои планы гораздо более амбициозны. Вскоре фон Валанциус станет самой могущественной династией Вольных Торговцев. Но даже не рассчитывайте, что я поделюсь с вами деталями своего плана. Вы все узнаете сами".

traits.locale_text: "Your interest in my dynasty is endless, isn't it? You should know that my plans are far more ambitious. House von Valancius will soon be the most powerful Rogue Trader dynasty in the Expanse. But do not hold your breath for details of my plan. You will have to wait and see."

"Your interest in my dynasty is endless, isn't it? You should know that my plans are far more ambitious. House von Valancius will soon be the most powerful Rogue Trader dynasty in the Expanse. But do not hold your breath for details of my plan. You will have to wait and see."

"Your interest in my dynasty is endless, isn't it? You should know that my plans are far more ambitious. House von Valancius will soon be the most powerful Rogue Trader dynasty in the Expanse. But do not hold your breath for details of my plan. You will have to wait and see."

languages.text: “你对我这王朝的兴趣，真是无穷无尽啊。那你该知道，我的谋划远比这更远大。冯·瓦兰修斯家很快就会成为整个扩区最强大的行商浪人王朝。但不要妄想打听具体细节。慢慢等着瞧吧。”
languages.original_text: "Your interest in my dynasty is endless, isn't it? You should know that my plans are far more ambitious. House von Valancius will soon be the most powerful Rogue Trader dynasty in the Expanse. But do not hold your breath for details of my plan. You will have to wait and see."

traits.locale_text: “你对我这王朝的兴趣，真是无穷无尽啊。那你该知道，我的谋划远比这更远大。冯·瓦兰修斯家很快就会成为整个扩区最强大的行商浪人王朝。但不要妄想打听具体细节。慢慢等着瞧吧。”

languages.text: « L'intérêt que vous portez à ma lignée ne connaît aucune limite, semble-t-il. Vous devriez savoir que mes projets sont autrement plus ambitieux. Bientôt, la maison von Valancius sera la plus puissante dynastie de libres-marchands de toutes les Étendues. Mais ne comptez pas sur moi pour vous divulguer les détails de mon plan. Patience, qui vivra verra. »
languages.original_text: "Your interest in my dynasty is endless, isn't it? You should know that my plans are far more ambitious. House von Valancius will soon be the most powerful Rogue Trader dynasty in the Expanse. But do not hold your breath for details of my plan. You will have to wait and see."

traits.locale_text: « L'intérêt que vous portez à ma lignée ne connaît aucune limite, semble-t-il. Vous devriez savoir que mes projets sont autrement plus ambitieux. Bientôt, la maison von Valancius sera la plus puissante dynastie de libres-marchands de toutes les Étendues. Mais ne comptez pas sur moi pour vous divulguer les détails de mon plan. Patience, qui vivra verra. »

languages.text: "Hanedanlığıma olan ilginin sonu yok sanırım. Seni temin ederim ki planlarım çok daha iddialı. Von Valancius Hanesi, yakında Enginlik'teki en güçlü Hür Tüccar hanedanlığı olacak. Ancak planımın ayrıntılarını sana anlatacağımı zannediyorsan pek yanılıyorsun. Bekleyip görmen gerekecek."
languages.original_text: "Your interest in my dynasty is endless, isn't it? You should know that my plans are far more ambitious. House von Valancius will soon be the most powerful Rogue Trader dynasty in the Expanse. But do not hold your breath for details of my plan. You will have to wait and see."

traits.locale_text: "Hanedanlığıma olan ilginin sonu yok sanırım. Seni temin ederim ki planlarım çok daha iddialı. Von Valancius Hanesi, yakında Enginlik'teki en güçlü Hür Tüccar hanedanlığı olacak. Ancak planımın ayrıntılarını sana anlatacağımı zannediyorsan pek yanılıyorsun. Bekleyip görmen gerekecek."

languages.text: «Su interés por mi dinastía no tiene límites, ¿eh? Debería saber que mis planes son mucho más ambiciosos. La casa von Valancius pronto será la dinastía de Comerciantes Independientes más poderosa de la Extensión. Pero no voy a entrar en detalles. Tendrá que esperar y ver».
languages.original_text: "Your interest in my dynasty is endless, isn't it? You should know that my plans are far more ambitious. House von Valancius will soon be the most powerful Rogue Trader dynasty in the Expanse. But do not hold your breath for details of my plan. You will have to wait and see."

traits.locale_text: «Su interés por mi dinastía no tiene límites, ¿eh? Debería saber que mis planes son mucho más ambiciosos. La casa von Valancius pronto será la dinastía de Comerciantes Independientes más poderosa de la Extensión. Pero no voy a entrar en detalles. Tendrá que esperar y ver».

languages.text: "Euer Interesse für meine Dynastie kennt keine Grenzen, oder? Ihr solltet wissen, dass meine Pläne weitaus ehrgeiziger sind. Bald wird Haus von Valancius die mächtigste Freihändler-Dynastie der Ausdehnung sein. Aber erwartet nicht, dass ich Euch die Details meines Plans erzähle. Wartet einfach ab und seht selbst."
languages.original_text: "Your interest in my dynasty is endless, isn't it? You should know that my plans are far more ambitious. House von Valancius will soon be the most powerful Rogue Trader dynasty in the Expanse. But do not hold your breath for details of my plan. You will have to wait and see."

traits.locale_text: "Euer Interesse für meine Dynastie kennt keine Grenzen, oder? Ihr solltet wissen, dass meine Pläne weitaus ehrgeiziger sind. Bald wird Haus von Valancius die mächtigste Freihändler-Dynastie der Ausdehnung sein. Aber erwartet nicht, dass ich Euch die Details meines Plans erzähle. Wartet einfach ab und seht selbst."

languages.text: 「私の王朝への関心は尽きないのですね。私の計画ははるかに野心的なことを知っておくべきです。バルアンシウス家は、間もなく広大な宇宙で最も強力なローグ・トレーダーの王朝になるでしょう。しかし、私の計画の詳細を期待しないでください。待つしかありません。」
languages.original_text: "Your interest in my dynasty is endless, isn't it? You should know that my plans are far more ambitious. House von Valancius will soon be the most powerful Rogue Trader dynasty in the Expanse. But do not hold your breath for details of my plan. You will have to wait and see."

traits.locale_text: 「私の王朝への関心は尽きないのですね。私の計画ははるかに野心的なことを知っておくべきです。バルアンシウス家は、間もなく広大な宇宙で最も強力なローグ・トレーダーの王朝になるでしょう。しかし、私の計画の詳細を期待しないでください。待つしかありません。」
